finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:13; chapters/chapter_03.md:15; chapters/chapter_03.md:21; chapters/chapter_03.md:37; chapters/chapter_03.md:83; chapters/chapter_03.md:107
finding_results.notes: Replaced the broad labor-market explanation with an added selection beat in the yard, kept the sorting logic visible through refusals and insults, and converted Claude's threat from abstract summary into a witnessed example of how his leverage travels.
finding_results.summary: The labor-yard hierarchy now lands through concrete on-page sorting and humiliation rather than primarily through authorial thesis.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:307; chapters/chapter_03.md:311; chapters/chapter_03.md:321; chapters/chapter_03.md:327; chapters/chapter_03.md:335; chapters/chapter_03.md:341
finding_results.notes: Compressed the transit/logistics aftermath and extended the chapter into the apartment so Delroy hides the advance, spends part of the lie on the light bill, and has Marcia pressure the cover story immediately.
finding_results.summary: The chapter now ends with Delroy actively using and concealing Claude's money in front of Marcia, so the debt changes household leverage before the cut.

summary: Chapter 3 now resolves both packet findings by dramatizing the labor-yard sorting through added refusals and by ending on a contested household lie rather than on private preparation.
